---
title: "‘Church Disestablishment as a Factor in the General Election of 1885’"
---

## ‘Church Disestablishment as a Factor in the General Election of 1885’

**Author:** Alan Simon
**Date:** 1975
**Imprint:** <em>The Historical Journal </em>18 (1975) 791-820.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
